levels.name: Static
levels.proves: Schemas, documentation, contracts, and generated drift

levels.name: Fixture
levels.proves: Deterministic educational rendering and fixture signals

levels.name: Local smoke
levels.proves: Local scripts, tutorials, and safe install planning paths

levels.name: Isolated install
levels.proves: An exact artifact installs in a disposable identity and its tree matches

levels.name: Authenticated route
levels.proves: An isolated read-only route invocation obeys installation, inventory, and no-write safety contracts
levels.doesNotProve: Full workflow quality or broad adoption

levels.name: Live evaluation
levels.proves: Versioned multi-case behavior statistics for a named assistant and attempt policy
levels.doesNotProve: Other versions, user projects, or production outcomes
